title: Fried Fermented Gooey Mexican Eggplant
description: This solo dinner dish features fried fermented eggplant, a unique twist on traditional recipes with its gooey texture and nut-free-friendly profile.

ingredients.name: 2 tablespoons olive oil
ingredients.notes: ensure the temperature is not too high to prevent burning

ingredients.name: Salt and pepper, to taste
ingredients.notes: commonly used seasoning in Mexican cuisine

instructions: Slice the eggplants into rounds or cubes.
Cut out a small circle from the center of each slice to allow for easy flipping without sticking too much.
Season both sides with salt and pepper, then sprinkle finely chopped onion over the eggplant slices.
Place olive oil in a non-stick skillet over medium heat. When hot, add the prepared eggplants to the skillet.
Cook for about 3-4 minutes on each side or until golden brown and crispy. Flip carefully using spatulas with handles as they are easy to handle and reduce sticking.
Add minced garlic into the skillet, stirring well to combine with the eggplant slices, then squeeze lime juice over them.
